name: Wall Hook Shelf with Beading - White - Cloud Island™
description:
Curate a stylish wall display in your child’s room with this Wall Hook Shelf with Beading from cloud island™. This decorative wall shelf features beaded detailing and three peg hooks. A perfect blend of style and function, this decorative wall shelf provides you with a fresh accent that seamlessly integrates with a variety of decor styles. It can be mounted on any wall to provide a sleek platform to display framed photos, stuffed animals, small toys and more.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
